description_long: This hardware store occupies the ground floor of a two-story building with a steep, dark brown tiled hip roof and a prominent chimney. The facade features three large windows with white shutters and a central entrance door, all framed by a muted beige and white color scheme. The ground floor storefront is distinguished by a wide display window and a glass door, with the upper floors appearing residential, marked by shuttered windows. The side and rear walls are plain, gray, and unadorned, lacking windows or decorative elements. The building's structure is robust, likely constructed from masonry or concrete, with a traditional European urban architectural style. The overall appearance is clean and orderly, with no visible signage or exterior displays of hardware items.
description: A two-story beige and white building with a steep tiled roof, shuttered windows, and a ground-floor hardware store featuring a wide display window and glass door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three shuttered windows above, and a wide display window on the ground floor.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, windowless gray wall and the sloped roof with chimney visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door and two shuttered windows, minimal architectural detail, and the roof's slope.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a large, featureless gray wall and the roof with chimney.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide display window and a glass entrance door on the ground floor, with three shuttered windows above. The facade is symmetrical and clean, with no exterior displays or signage.
